languages.original_text: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."

languages.text: "Я ценю вашу сдержанность, Вольный Торговец. Как правило, данное утверждение в мой адрес звучит не в виде вопроса, а обвинения. Я не буду пытаться вас убеждать в своей праведности, но я озвучу несколько фактов, на основе которых вы сами сможете прийти к собственному выводу".

languages.text: «Agradezco su consideración, Comerciante. En mi experiencia, esas palabras no se utilizan como pregunta, sino como acusación. No intentaré convencerl{mf|e|a} de mi buena fe, pero explicaré unos datos que podrá considerar como base de sus propias conclusiones».
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."

traits.locale_text: «Agradezco su consideración, Comerciante. En mi experiencia, esas palabras no se utilizan como pregunta, sino como acusación. No intentaré convencerl{mf|e|a} de mi buena fe, pero explicaré unos datos que podrá considerar como base de sus propias conclusiones».

languages.text: “我很感谢您的克制，行商浪人。以我的经验，这种针对我的话通常不是提问，而是指控。我不会试图说服您相信我是对的，但我会陈述几个事实，您可以凭此作出您的判断。”
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."

traits.locale_text: “我很感谢您的克制，行商浪人。以我的经验，这种针对我的话通常不是提问，而是指控。我不会试图说服您相信我是对的，但我会陈述几个事实，您可以凭此作出您的判断。”

languages.text: « J'apprécie votre retenue, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Si j'en crois mon expérience, il ne s'agit pas d'une question, mais d'une accusation. Je ne vais pas tenter de vous convaincre de ma vertu, mais plutôt exposer quelques faits dont vous pourrez vous servir pour tirer vos propres conclusions. »
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."

traits.locale_text: « J'apprécie votre retenue, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Si j'en crois mon expérience, il ne s'agit pas d'une question, mais d'une accusation. Je ne vais pas tenter de vous convaincre de ma vertu, mais plutôt exposer quelques faits dont vous pourrez vous servir pour tirer vos propres conclusions. »

languages.text: "Ich weißt Eure Zurückhaltung zu schätzen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Meiner Erfahrung nach sind derartige an mich gerichtete Worte keine Frage, sondern ein Vorwurf. Ich werde nicht versuchen, Euch von meiner Rechtschaffenheit zu überzeugen, aber einige Fakten vorbringen, die Ihr als Basis für Eure eigenen Rückschlüsse verwenden könnt."
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weißt Eure Zurückhaltung zu schätzen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Meiner Erfahrung nach sind derartige an mich gerichtete Worte keine Frage, sondern ein Vorwurf. Ich werde nicht versuchen, Euch von meiner Rechtschaffenheit zu überzeugen, aber einige Fakten vorbringen, die Ihr als Basis für Eure eigenen Rückschlüsse verwenden könnt."

languages.text: "ローグ・トレーダー"、君の自制心には感謝するよ。私の経験では、私に向けられたそのような言葉は、質問ではなく、告発になる。私の正しさを説得しようとは思わないが、あなた自身の結論の根拠として使えるよう、いくつかの事実を明確にしよう。"
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."

languages.text: "Kendinize hâkim olmanızı takdir ediyorum Hür Tacir. Benim tecrübelerime göre bana yöneltilen bu tür sözler aslında soru değil, suçlama ifadesidir. Sizi haklılığıma inandırmaya çalışmayacağım ancak kendi başınıza sonuca varabilmeniz için temel olarak kullanabileceğiniz birkaç gerçeği dile getireceğim."
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."
